title: Blood on the Clocktower
description: A Minecraft implementation of Steven Medway's Blood on the Clocktower.
body:
![The words "Blood on the Clocktower" written in pixelated text.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68c5ebfa1f2d8dd53d3a5e27dc87b633c169f63d.png) From The Pandemonium Institute: _In the quiet village of Ravenswood Bluff a demon walks amongst you, killing by night and disguised in human form by day. Will the good townsfolk put the puzzle together in time to execute the true demon, or will evil overrun this once peaceful village?_ _In Blood on the Clocktower dead players are never eliminated, every player knows something that can impact the outcome, players may enter a game after it starts, the Storyteller may give misinformation to players who are 'drunk' or 'poisoned', and the dynamic Storyteller role leads each game to a nail-biting outcome. No two games are ever the same and death is not the end..._ --- "Clocktower" is a social deduction game that will remind you of games like Werewolf or Town of Salem. This modpack is an implementation of the game's mechanics, making it convenient to play with your friends in Minecraft. ### How to Play: The game rulebook [can be found here](https://boardgamegeek.com/boardgame/240980/blood-on-the-clocktower/files). You will need to set up a server using the included map; make sure that command blocks are enabled, and that you have opped your Storyteller(s). You will likely need to follow your server provider's instructions for setting up Simple Voice Chat. 5 players plus a Storyteller are required to play, and 15 players is the limit. You can also play in games I Storytell [on my server](https://discord.gg/VhZYAR8TjY). ### ‼️Installation Adding this modpack to your server is slightly more involved than a regular modpack. I have linked a video guide below, but the instructions are as follows: - Install the modpack as you would any other. - Move the contents of /server/config into /config. - Move the contents of /saves into your server's root folder. - [Setup Simple Voice Chat](https://modrepo.de/minecraft/voicechat/wiki/server_setup). - Op yourself from the server console. - Run /reload. - Run /function ct:init/yawp_reset. - Run /function ct:init/yawp_regions. - Done!
Video Guide
### Issues and Suggestions: You can find a comprehensive list of known bugs, missing features, and planned QoL on [the project's Issues page](https://github.com/Sybillian/minecraft-botc/issues). Please submit any bugs here! ### Credits: - Blood on the Clocktower by The Pandemonium Instutute. - [Default character icons](https://github.com/tomozbot/botc-icons/) by tomozbot. - Pixel icons for every single character in the game made by our Discord community. Thank you so much!
